scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm -F @vben/web-admin exec vite build --mode desktop
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173/admin && pnpm run build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173/admin electron .
scripts.dist: pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:web && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ electron-builder
scripts.pack: pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:web && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ electron-builder --dir
